title: Advanced Teleporters
description: Adds vanilla progression friendly teleporting systems to the game.
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf98a76450d8061a7872cded9fe06f1acd770f89.png)


**Whats new ?**

Now players can craft and place teleporters to teleport and save their coordinations. There are 4+1 teleporters and a remote device that players can use. It's a mod I made with the hope that it will give the player a sense of progress that will not bore them throughout the general progression of the game with useful and easy to understand mechanics.

 ![img](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7de64c5d48b2f212f96f0121297ceaf9c581f01e.png) 

**How does teleporters work ? - Main teleporters**

Main teleporters are expensive machines, of which there are 4: copper, gold, diamond and netherite. The player can connect to the teleporter system by clicking on any of the main machines.Player opens the teleporter UI according to the tier of the machine they last interacted with; these levels are important because with each increasing level, you gain +3 save & teleport slots. Forexample diamond teleporter has 9 teleport slots and netherite teleporter has 12.

 

 

**How does teleporters work ? - Side teleporters**

Side teleporters are machines that are cheaper than the main teleporters but do not have any level value. Which means after connecting to a main&host teleporter player can place down these cheaper teleporters to teleport around. Players who doesnt have a main connection will going to have "There is no host connection." message after interacting with it.

 

 

**How does teleporters work ? - Teleporter remote control**

This handheld device works similarly to side teleporters, which means again it doesn't have its own level value so if player didn't interacted with a main teleporter before they will going to have "Teleporter remote control is offline." message after interacting with it. However unlike main&side teleporters,handheld devices cannot save coordinates in order to teleport back to the same place and they consume 1x dimension pearl per teleportation. Dimension pearls can be crafted with 4x ender pearls and 1x lapis luzili in the crafting table.

**Quick Note:** After crafting Teleporter remote control it will be on its "offline" stage which you need to click to a main teleporter with it in order to use. 

**JEI and Netherite Portal Frame Craft bug**

For some reason JEI shows Netherite Portal Frame is crafted with another "Netherite Portal Frame" instead of Diamond Portal Frame. Sorry for the confusion but there is not really much i can that i know to fix that. Craft itself is still correct, it doesnt require another Netherite Portal Frame to begin with its still 1x Motherboard, 1x Diamond Portal Frame, 1x Netherite as always.
